## [0.0.1] - 2026-03-15


Initial release of acpx, a simple Rust library and tooling layer for building on ACP.



### Added

- Repository scaffolding, release automation, and planning baseline for acpx.

[0.0.1]: https://github.com/imumesh18/acpx/releases/tag/v0.0.1
